command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2HhSjZvaCXKQGrz.root --database Bsk4ozJFukmegE5iMnzBQL --execute 
INSERT INTO resellers (userId, companyName, creditBalance, totalCreditsUsed, status) 
SELECT id, 'Test Reseller Company', '1000.00', '0.00', 'active' 
FROM users WHERE username = 'reseller' AND id NOT IN (SELECT userId FROM resellers);
